patterns: What can you say about the college?
responses: Sri Vijay Vidyalaya College of Arts & Science
The college offers 24 (UG) Courses, 12 (PG) Courses, 9 M.Phil and 6 Ph.D Programmes.

patterns: Tell me about the college's establishment
responses: The college was established in 1987

patterns: Which university is the college affiliated to?

responses: The college is affiliated to Periyar University.

responses: The college has 9 M.Phil and 6 Ph.D Programmes.

patterns: What courses does the college offer?

List of courses at the college
responses: The college offers a variety of courses including B.A., B.Sc., M.A., M.Sc., Ph.D., and more.
Some of the courses offered are B.A. Economics, B.Sc. Mathematics, M.A. Tamil, M.Sc. Computer Science, and more.

patterns: How many students are currently enrolled?

responses: Presently, the college has 3808 students.
The college is vibrant with 3808 students on roll.
It is promoting academic excellence and generating employable citizens.

patterns: Who is the founder of Sri Vijay Vidyalaya College.
Who is the Chairman of Sri Vijay Vidyalaya College
responses: Sri.D.N.Chinnaswamy was the founder of Sri Vijay Vidyalaya College .
The Chairman of Sri Vijay Vidyalaya College is Mr.D.N.C.Manivannan.
He is an educationist,enterpreneur and philanthropist with 40 years of experience and he led to the development of successful instituitons in Dhrmapuri,Krishnagiri,Tripattur and Tiruvannamalai

patterns: What are the achievements of the college
How many gold medals does the college achieved in 2024
responses: The college has produced many doctors and engineers in top colleges every year.
By last year,9 Gold medals were achieved by students of various departments .

patterns: Tell me about the undergraduate courses
responses: The college offers the following Undergraduate courses:1. B.A. Tamil,2. B.A. English, 3. B.A. Economics, 4. B.A. History, 5. B.Com., 6. B.Sc.Botany, 7. B.Sc. Bio Chemistry ,8. B.Sc. Mathematics, 9. B.Sc. Computer Science,10. B.Sc. Physics,11. B.Sc. Chemistry,12. B.Sc. Zoology

patterns: Tell me about the postgraduate courses
responses: The college offers the following Postgraduate courses:1. M.A. Tamil, 2. M.A. English, 3. M.Com.,4. M.Sc. Mathematics,5. M.Sc. Computer Science,6. M.Sc. Bio Chemistry,7. M.Sc Physics

patterns: What are the companies that the college offers for placements?
responses: Our College students benefit from the Placement cell, which guides the students in choosing their career depending on their skill.
The college offers the top recruiting companies like Infosys,Tata,HCL,Wipo,Mahendra,TCS and so on.
Circulars were circulated to I & II shift final year students regarding student databases for placement drives/interviews received from Periyar University, Salem.
Circulars were also circulated regarding TANCET, NIMCET awareness programs and entrance exams by AIM Institute, Bulls Academy, Chennai.
Our Hostel is like a next home, women warden are appointed to take care of students.
A neat dress code are followed and a hygienic food is been provided for the students.

patterns: what are the features of college library
how many books are their in library
responses: Our library has good range of books on science,literature,personalities,economics etc.,.
The library contains E-learning library with Wi_Fi Facility computers
The total number of books in our library are 23,952
On July 22nd, 2019, In Focus IT Solutions conducted a seminar on 'Skills to be developed in the 21st century and recent trends in computer science'.
Mr. Karuppanasamy, director of In Focus IT Academy, emphasized the importance of International IT certification. Venue: µp lab. Participants: Students of computer science.

patterns: Tell me about Computer science department?

responses: Department of Computer Science was started with B.Sc and B.C.A in the year of 2010,Ten of our faculty members are experts in various fields of teaching and research activities, Computer science department graduate and post graduate students won 8 Gold medals and 52 university ranks
Mrs.Dr.N.Kowsalya is the current Hod of computer science Department
